prompt: Photorealistic winery production floor at harvest: a crusher-destemmer actively processing red grape clusters, cellar operator in clean PPE monitoring hopper and roller gap, grape must flowing into receiving bin, realistic stainless steel equipment, natural industrial lighting, detailed textures.

lighting: soft natural warehouse light with practical overheads
constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no people facing camera
